p-ranav/indicators
Source: https://github.com/p-ranav/indicators
Tag: v2.3
Commit: 26d39ad8fb438f5f50fb16427f554045d8431030

Copied paths:
- include/indicators -> third_party/include/indicators
- LICENSE -> third_party/licenses/indicators-MIT.txt
- LICENSE.termcolor -> third_party/licenses/indicators-termcolor-BSD.txt

Local patches:
- third_party/include/indicators/termcolor.hpp includes <cstdint> so the
  vendored headers are self-contained when compiled under modern Clang.
